statements.sql: select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` = 14 and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (14) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'

select sum(`estimated_cost`) as aggregate from `purchase_requisition_items` where exists (select * from `purchase_requisitions` where `purchase_requisition_items`.`purchase_requisition_id` = `purchase_requisitions`.`id` and `purchase_requisition_id` = 1)
